perturbation.original_text: The Parties agree that the list of DD Target Segment Prescribers (hereinafter, "DD Target List") will be provided to MBRK by DD. MBRK shall have final approval of the DD Target List. MBRK receipt and approval of the DD Target List shall be documented in writing by the Parties. DD Target Segment Prescribers shall consist of only those licensed prescribers whose clinical practice is consistent with MOXATAG's approved labeling, uses, and indication. It is anticipated that the DD Target List may exclude at MBRK's discretion, those prescribers that MBRK includes it its called upon healthcare practitioners, telemarketing program and as communicated to DD prior to the DD Target List being approved by MBRK. Any subsequent modifications to the DD Target List will be as approved in writing by the Parties.
perturbation.changed_text: The Parties agree that the list of DD Target Segment Prescribers will be provided to MBRK by DD. MBRK shall have final approval of the DD Target Segment Prescribers. DD Target Segment Prescribers shall consist of only those licensed prescribers whose clinical practice is consistent with MOXATAG's approved labeling, uses, and indication. Any subsequent modifications to the DD Target Segment Prescribers will be made by DD.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the requirement for MBRK's written documentation and approval for the 'DD Target List' and assigning the authority to make subsequent modifications to DD, creates a contradiction with Section 3.1. Where MBRK has the final approval as to the promotion solutions. Now, the target segment is determined by DD, which influence the promotion solution to be utilized by DD in promoting MOXATAG, thus creating an uncertainty of authority over the promotion solutions to be deployed.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 3.1 DD will promote MOXATAG to DD Target Segment Prescribers using its full suite of promotion solutions where DD and MBRK deem appropriate, including but not limited to DD's a) eSampling Platform, b) eLearning / eDetailing, c) Educational Email, d) Direct-to-Physician Bulletin Services, e) Physician Portal Promotions, f) Patient Portal Promotions, g) Direct Mail Advertising, h) Coupon Promotions, i) Consumer Condition Content, j) Search Engine Marketing and k) Mini Web Site Promotions where appropriate and with prior written approval from MBRK. MBRK shall have final approval as to the promotion solutions utilized by DD in the promotion of MOXATAG and DD will not deploy any promotion solution without such approval from MBRK. Such promotion solutions are as listed in EXHIBIT 4. In the event that the Parties mutually agree on the provision of additional services beyond those listed in EXHIBIT 4, such additional promotional solutions shall be approved by MBRK and additional Appendices numbered sequentially (1, 2, 3, 4 etc.) setting forth in detail the additional services shall be duly signed by authorized representatives of the Parties and attached to EXHIBIT 4 and incorporated herein. The services contained in EXHIBIT 4 and any related modifications thereto represent those services that are reasonably necessary to accomplish the promotion of MOXATAG. No services shall be provided by DD, or paid for by MBRK, except as agreed to in writing by the Parties.
perturbation.justification: The original text gave MBRK final approval of the DD Target List and required written approval for modifications. The changed text removes MBRK's final approval on the DD Target List and assigns DD the authority to make subsequent modifications. This directly contradicts section 3.1, which states "MBRK shall have final approval as to the promotion solutions utilized by DD in the promotion of MOXATAG and DD will not deploy any promotion solution without such approval from MBRK." Because the target segment influences promotion solutions, DD now determining the target list independently creates uncertainty and potential conflict with MBRK's approval rights, making the two sections incompatible.

perturbation.original_text: MBRK agrees to provide DD, to the best of its ability, with the following: The Cost of Samples Amount and the Cost of Coupon Amount shall be at the expense of MBRK. • Relevant portions of its MOXATAG marketing and communications plan, • MBRK-approved MOXATAG sales promotion materials in electronic format where available, • MOXATAG sales and training aids, including any eDetailing web site or relevant product materials, • All applicable MBRK policies and procedures that MBRK requires DD to comply with, including MBRK policies governing interactions with physicians and other Medical Professionals, • Analysis where available regarding promotion effectiveness of prior promotions, • Any available market research concerning MOXATAG, • Direct mail collateral pieces as shall be used from time to time by MBRK to promote MOXATAG to DD Target Segment Prescribers, • Timely review and approval of DD provided draft promotion material for use by DD, • The availability of MOXATAG Coupons and MOXATAG samples and the related fulfillment services as agreed to in advance by MBRK, • Monthly reporting, detailed by prescriber of redemption of MOXATAG Coupons, and • Monthly and quarterly attendance at status meetings, as appropriate, which may be via telephone, web based meeting/portal or face to face.
perturbation.changed_text: MBRK agrees to provide DD, to the best of its ability, with the following: • Relevant portions of its MOXATAG marketing and communications plan, • MOXATAG sales and training aids, including any eDetailing web site or relevant product materials, • All applicable MBRK policies and procedures that MBRK requires DD to comply with, including MBRK policies governing interactions with physicians and other Medical Professionals, • Analysis where available regarding promotion effectiveness of prior promotions, • Any available market research concerning MOXATAG, • Direct mail collateral pieces as shall be used from time to time by MBRK to promote MOXATAG to DD Target Segment Prescribers, • Timely review and approval of DD provided draft promotion material for use by DD, • Monthly reporting, detailed by prescriber of redemption of MOXATAG Coupons, and • Monthly and quarterly attendance at status meetings, as appropriate, which may be via telephone, web based meeting/portal or face to face.
perturbation.explanation: By removing 'MBRK-approved MOXATAG sales promotion materials in electronic format where available' and 'The availability of MOXATAG Coupons and MOXATAG samples and the related fulfillment services as agreed to in advance by MBRK', it generates an in-text contradiction with Section 9.5. (3) of the Agreement, specifically the assertion that MBRK will indemnify and hold DD harmless from assertions made in Promotional Materials, given MBRK no longer has the obligation of providing those promotional materials, creating uncertainty in enforcing this section. Also in Section 6.1, MBRK agrees to make available to DD the items as stipulated in EXHIBIT 2, it creates a contradiction on what MBRK is responsible for.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 9.5. MBRK shall indemnify and hold DD harmless from and against any damages, loss or expenses, including reasonable attorneys' fees, DD may sustain or incur as the result of any Legal Claims made, brought, or threatened against DD, arising out of: (1) any negligent or willful act or omission of MBRK, or any of its Representatives, to the extent that such Legal Claim does not arise from the negligent or willful act or omission of DD, or any of its Representatives; (2) any adverse events relating to the use of MBRK products; (3) assertions made in Promotional Materials, provided MBRK approved such Promotional Materials prior to implementation, including those that DD prepared for MBRK, and there are no deviations in such Promotional Material from the time MBRK provides DD with approval of such Promotional Material to the time that such Promotional Material is produced, printed and/or distributed by DD or on behalf of DD or MBRK; or (4) any breach by MBRK of any of its representations, warranties or obligations under this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The omission of 'MBRK-approved MOXATAG sales promotion materials in electronic format where available' and 'The availability of MOXATAG Coupons and MOXATAG samples and the related fulfillment services as agreed to in advance by MBRK' directly contradicts section 9.5. (3) because MBRK indemnifies DD from assertions made in 'Promotional Materials, provided MBRK approved such Promotional Materials prior to implementation'. By removing the explicit provision of promotional materials, MBRK creates a situation where it might still be held liable for materials it no longer provides or approves, leading to a direct contradiction and potentially unenforceable indemnity clause. This is a direct conflict, satisfying the 'Omissions – In Text Contradiction' definition.

perturbation.original_text: For purposes of this Agreement, Prescriber Data will be the prescription data for the activity within the U.S. for the USC Level 2 #15151 — Aminopenicillins category, in sufficient detail to identify periodic prescribing activity of MOXATAG. Such prescriber activity will be the basis for DD to calculate the Promotion Fees due as per Section 5 for the applicable Promotion Measurement Period.
perturbation.changed_text: For purposes of this Agreement, Prescriber Data will be the prescription data for activity within the U.S. in sufficient detail to identify periodic prescribing activity. Such prescriber activity will be the basis for DD to calculate the Promotion Fees due as per Section 5 for the applicable Promotion Measurement Period.
perturbation.explanation: By omitting the specific category 'USC Level 2 #15151 — Aminopenicillins' from the definition of 'Prescriber Data', it introduces ambiguity. The reference to 'Prescriber Data' as the basis for calculating Promotion Fees in Section 5 remains, but the precise scope of data to be used is no longer clearly defined. This omission introduces uncertainty in enforcing the payment terms because it opens the door for disputes about what data should be included in the calculation of Promotion Fees, creating an in-text contradiction with the explicitness of the fees.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 5. 6. The basis for determining the Promotion Fees will be the Prescriber Data provided by MBRK to DD.
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies that 'Prescriber Data' pertains to the 'USC Level 2 #15151 — Aminopenicillins' category, providing a clear scope for calculating Promotion Fees. The changed text removes this specific category, making the definition of 'Prescriber Data' ambiguous. This ambiguity directly contradicts the contradicted text (Section 5. 6), which states that 'Promotion Fees will be the Prescriber Data provided by MBRK to DD.' Without a clear definition of 'Prescriber Data', as it pertains to a specific category, the basis for determining Promotion Fees becomes uncertain, creating a contradiction.
